name: DLQ Retry Processor
description: Scheduled workflow that processes DLQ entries ready for retry. Runs every 5 minutes to attempt retries with exponential backoff.

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id, execution_id, original_payload, error_message, error_category,
  status, retry_count, max_retries, next_retry_at, retry_history
FROM form_submission_dlq
WHERE status = 'PENDING_RETRY'
  AND next_retry_at <= NOW()
ORDER BY next_retry_at ASC, created_at ASC
LIMIT 50
UPDATE form_submission_dlq SET status = 'IN_PROGRESS', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'

={{ 'UPDATE form_submission_dlq SET status = ''RESOLVED'', resolved_at = NOW(), retry_count = ' + ($json.retry_count + 1) + ', retry_history = retry_history || ''[{' + '"attempt_number": ' + ($json.retry_count + 1) + ', "attempted_at": "' + new Date().toISOString() + '", "result": "success"}]''::jsonb WHERE id = ''' + $json.id + '''' }}

={{ 'UPDATE form_submission_dlq SET status = ''PERMANENT_FAILURE'', retry_count = ' + $json.new_retry_count + ', last_failure_at = NOW(), retry_history = retry_history || ''[{' + '"attempt_number": ' + $json.new_retry_count + ', "attempted_at": "' + new Date().toISOString() + '", "result": "failed", "error": "' + ($json.retry_error || 'Max retries exceeded').replace(/'/g, ''') + '"}]''::jsonb, review_notes = COALESCE(review_notes, '''') || ''\n[' + new Date().toISOString() + '] Marked permanent: Max retries exceeded'' WHERE id = ''' + $json.id + '''' }}

={{ 'UPDATE form_submission_dlq SET status = ''PENDING_RETRY'', retry_count = ' + $json.new_retry_count + ', next_retry_at = ''' + $json.next_retry_at + ''', last_failure_at = NOW(), retry_history = retry_history || ''[{' + '"attempt_number": ' + $json.new_retry_count + ', "attempted_at": "' + new Date().toISOString() + '", "result": "failed", "error": "' + ($json.retry_error || 'Unknown error').replace(/'/g, ''') + '"}]''::jsonb WHERE id = ''' + $json.id + '''' }}
